<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: a block build() returning an inline array without #cache.
 */

namespace Drupal\my_module\Plugin\Block;

/**
 * A block that returns uncacheable inline markup.
 */
class UncachedBlock {

  public function build() {
    return [
      '#markup' => 'Current time: ' . time(),
    ];
  }

}
